flags.headline: New fine imposed by the Commission in Digital Markets Act investigations
flags.explanation: The Commission fined the Company €500 million in the Article 5(4) Investigation and issued a cease and desist order requiring changes to company practices. This represents a significant new legal liability and operational restriction.
flags.evidence_newer: On April 23, 2025, the Commission fined the Company €500 million in the Article 5(4) Investigation and issued a cease and desist order requiring the Company to remove technical and commercial restrictions that prevent developers from steering users to alternative distribution channels outside the App Store.

analyst_summary: A substantial legal risk has arisen due to a €500 million fine related to the Digital Markets Act investigations. This fine introduces a significant burden on the company, requiring immediate operational changes and raising concerns regarding compliance and future operations.
